description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a twisted green stem and a carved, expressive face. The front features two sharply angled eyes and a large, jagged mouth, giving it a menacing, animated appearance. The pumpkin's surface is textured with natural grooves and subtle color variations, ranging from deep orange to lighter yellowish tones. The interior is hollow, visible through the wide mouth opening, and the edges of the carved sections are slightly rough and uneven. The stem is thick, gnarled, and bends dramatically, adding to the character of the pumpkin. There are no additional decorations or accessories present, and the pumpkin appears to be designed for display, possibly as a Halloween decoration.
description: A carved orange pumpkin with a twisted green stem and a jagged, expressive face. The surface is textured and the interior is hollow, visible through the large mouth opening.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full carved face with sharp eyes and a wide, jagged mouth, as well as the twisted green stem.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the mouth opening and the pronounced curve of the stem.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, grooved back of the pumpkin and the full length of the stem.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the mouth opening from a different angle and the stem's dramatic bend.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional style with a menacing face motif, featuring sharply angled eyes and a large, jagged mouth cutout. The carving is rough and expressive, with no additional symbols or etchings.
